author: mark
text:
Resolve federation topic: trail topology + config layering

Folds the federation resolution into bl-2e26 as a new section. Trail topology distinguishes shared-hub mirroring (--remote, one branch, N clones) from federation shadowing (--center, separate anchor layering config over a center terminus). Next-step pointer is a single scalar 'next: <url>' (no branch/auth/ttl fields). config/balls.yaml layers the whole trail (innermost anchor wins, no depth cap); run-parts dirs resolve first-defining-wins; tasks are terminus-local and never federate. bl sync refreshes every step checkout on the trail.
